LAW AND MOTION, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF KAREN NANCY STANWAY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO DEFENDANTS STEVEN A. BROWN, BFRF, LLC, AND BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTS IN PART AND DENIES IN PART THE MOTION. THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM IS GRANTED. THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FIDUCIARY DUTY IS DENIED. THE THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE GRANTED. THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTIONS AS TO NEGLIGENCE IS DENIED. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 AND CCP 437C(G).JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216, GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG (302/SRB)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar

Motion To Enter The [Proposed] Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KAREN NANCY STANWAY's Motion To Enter The [Proposed] Stipulated Judgment.

Plaintiff Stanway's motion to enter stipulated judgment is granted.

Order and stipulated judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Defendants Steven A. Brown, Bfrf, Llc, And Better Property Management
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Camillo Artiga-Purcell, Esq. (650-697-6000) for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Ronald Goldman, Esq. (415-435-5600) for Defendant/opposing party through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court announces the tentative ruling on the Motion for Summary Judgment as Denied and/or the motion for summary adjudication is Granted in part and Denied in part. (as fully reported on the reporter's notes) Plaintiff's Counsel argues negligent misrepresentation and fraud. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KAREN NANCY STANWAY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Defendants Steven A. Brown, Bfrf, Llc, And Better Property Management is granted in part and Denied in part. The first cause of action as to the breach of contract claim is granted. The second cause of action for fiduciary duty is Denied. The third and fifth causes of action are granted. The Fourth cause of actions as to negligence is Denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Moving party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and CCP 437c(g).Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/SRB)
